purpose: Move repeatable answer-shape rules out of natural-language prompts and into a code-validated live LLM output contract. Visible answers must lead with audience-facing insight, while process evidence stays in trace/developer UI.

sections.body: string or string[]; Korean investor-facing prose

sourceLimitationNote.requiredWhen: any source state is fixture, fallback, or error

rejectionRules: reject duplicate or unapproved section titles
reject raw claim IDs and trace/schema/debug terms
reject live outputs that ignore the question-specific answerPlan
reject live outputs that do not lead with 핵심 인사이트
reject first sections that narrate collection, loading, validation, or trace process instead of audience-facing insight
fallback to deterministic composer when validation fails

frameworkRelationship.instructor: Best immediate runtime guard candidate because it formalizes typed structured outputs and validation retries.
frameworkRelationship.dspy: Selected paper-facing optimization framework; use offline after the deterministic baseline is stable.
frameworkRelationship.guidance: Candidate for future constrained decoding where regex/CFG-level control is required.
frameworkRelationship.openpipe: Candidate after enough production traces exist for fine-tuning and cost reduction.
